page_0281.png: Training manual stock photo of a diverse group of four people working at computers in a library or collaborative learning space, with a young Black woman smiling in the foreground at a CRT monitor
page_0286.png: Screenshot of the InTouch HMI Graphic Editor with a Carousel widget placed on the design canvas and the Widgets toolbox panel on the right showing available widgets: Carousel, Datagrid, Map_App, QRCode_Scanner, Teamwork, and Web_Browser under the TrainingGalaxy project
page_0287_0.png: Screenshot of the Properties panel for Carousel1 widget showing position (X:1290, Y:270), size (100x100), fill style (white), text style (Arial 12pt), runtime behavior settings (Enabled, Visible, TabStop), and Widget Properties section with AutoPlay, BackgroundColor, GraphicNames, Interval, Keyboard, Loop, and Pause
page_0287_1.png: Screenshot of the Widget Properties panel for the Carousel widget with GraphicNames property highlighted and set to Line1_MixingProcess,ClockAnalogWall, showing Autoplay: True, BackgroundColor: #FFFFFF, Interval: 5000, Keyboard: True, Loop: True, Pause: True
page_0288_0.png: Screenshot of the Home ribbon toolbar in the InTouch HMI editor showing Clipboard group (Paste, Cut, Copy, Duplicate) and Insert group (Button, Text, Graphics), with the Windows panel showing the project window hierarchy on the left
page_0288_1.png: Screenshot of the Window Properties panel for a window named Carousel with Comment set to Display System Graphics, Window type: Replace, Location X:420 Y:320, Size 1500x680, White background color, Title bar disabled, Frame style: Single
page_0289_0.png: Screenshot of the Industrial Graphics editor showing the Dashboard symbol being edited with a Carousel widget area, the Industrial Graphics library panel listing available symbols (Agitator_Detailed, Dashboard, Level_Detailed, Line1_MixingProcess, etc.), and Properties panel showing Dashboard graphic with Maintain aspect ratio checked
page_0289_1.png: Screenshot of the Carousel widget design view with an empty white canvas area showing Widget and Carousel labels, Properties panel on the right showing GraphicName: Dashboard, Maintain aspect ratio unchecked, Show zoom control: Auto, Interaction mode: PanZoom, and description text for Maintain aspect ratio setting
page_0290.png: Composite screenshot showing on the left an industrial process monitoring HMI with two mixer units (Mixer200 Line 1 and Mixer400 Line 1) displaying level and temperature readings with pump/inlet/outlet components, and on the right a close-up of an analog wall clock showing approximately 9:40
page_0291_0.png: Screenshot of the Windows panel in the InTouch HMI IDE with a right-click context menu on the Carousel window showing options: Close, Save, Save as, Delete, Window Scripts, Update thumbnail, Convert to Industrial Graphics, and Properties
page_0291_1.png: Screenshot of the Windows panel with ContentDisplay window selected, showing the canvas workspace with a Mixers header at the top and a Consumed Materials panel at the bottom displaying consumed materials quantity of current batch
